# Test Scripts Output — 可执行测试脚本输出模板

> 当 Quality Guardian 发现问题时，不仅仅是报告问题——它会**自动生成可执行的测试脚本**，让开发者能直接复现和验证问题的修复。

---

## 1. 通用模板结构

所有生成的测试脚本遵循统一的结构：

```
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Source: [验收报告ID or SessionID]
// Issue: [优先级]-[编号] - [问题标题]
// Product: [产品名]
// Page: [页面URL/路径]
// Date: YYYY-MM-DD
// Instructions: Run this test to verify the fix
```

---

## 2. Cypress 测试脚本

### 2.1 通用 Cypress 模板

```javascript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Source: ACC-2026-0722-001
// Issue: P0-1 - Buttons below 44px touch target
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal
// Page: /supplier/list
// Date: 2026-07-22
// Instructions: npx cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/accessibility/touch-targets.cy.js

describe('[P0-1] Touch Target Compliance - Supplier List', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    cy.visit('/supplier/list');
    cy.viewport(1280, 720);
  });

  it('All buttons should be at least 44x44px', () => {
    cy.get('button').each(($btn) => {
      const rect = $btn[0].getBoundingClientRect();
      expect(rect.height).to.be.at.least(44,
        `Button "${$btn.text().trim()}" height ${rect.height}px < 44px`);
      expect(rect.width).to.be.at.least(44,
        `Button "${$btn.text().trim()}" width ${rect.width}px < 44px`);
    });
  });

  it('All links styled as buttons (a.btn) should be at least 44x44px', () => {
    cy.get('a.btn, a.button, [role="button"]').each(($el) => {
      const rect = $el[0].getBoundingClientRect();
      expect(rect.height).to.be.at.least(44);
      expect(rect.width).to.be.at.least(44);
    });
  });

  it('Form inputs should be at least 44px tall', () => {
    cy.get('input, select, textarea').each(($input) => {
      const rect = $input[0].getBoundingClientRect();
      expect(rect.height).to.be.at.least(44,
        `Input "${$input.attr('name') || $input.attr('id')}" is only ${rect.height}px tall`);
    });
  });
});
```

### 2.2 布局错乱检测

```javascript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P1-3 - Layout breakage at 768px viewport width
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal

describe('[P1-3] Responsive Layout - 768px', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    cy.visit('/supplier/detail?id=123');
  });

  it('No horizontal overflow at 768px', () => {
    cy.viewport(768, 1024);
    cy.wait(500);
    cy.document().then((doc) => {
      const body = doc.body;
      expect(body.scrollWidth).to.be.at.most(body.clientWidth + 1,
        'Page has horizontal scroll at 768px');
    });
  });

  it('All sections stay within viewport at 768px', () => {
    cy.viewport(768, 1024);
    cy.wait(500);
    cy.get('section, div[class*="container"], div[class*="wrapper"]').each(($section) => {
      const rect = $section[0].getBoundingClientRect();
      expect(rect.left).to.be.at.least(0);
      expect(rect.right).to.be.at.most(cy.config('viewportWidth') + 1);
    });
  });

  it('No overlapping elements', () => {
    cy.viewport(768, 1024);
    cy.wait(500);
    cy.get('*').each(($el) => {
      if ($el.css('position') === 'fixed' || $el.css('position') === 'absolute') {
        const rect = $el[0].getBoundingClientRect();
        // Filter out invisible elements
        if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) {
          expect(rect.left + rect.width).to.be.at.most(cy.config('viewportWidth') + 2,
            `Element clipped: ${$el.prop('tagName')} ${$el.attr('class')}`);
        }
      }
    });
  });
});
```

### 2.3 表单验证检测

```javascript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P0-2 - Submit button not disabled with invalid form
// Product: TAL Supplier Registration

describe('[P0-2] Form Validation - Submit disabled when invalid', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    cy.visit('/register');
  });

  it('Submit button is disabled when required fields are empty', () => {
    cy.get('button[type="submit"]').should('be.disabled');
  });

  it('Submit button enables when all fields are valid', () => {
    cy.get('input[name="name"]').type('Test Supplier');
    cy.get('input[name="email"]').type('test@example.com');
    cy.get('input[name="phone"]').type('13800138000');
    cy.get('button[type="submit"]').should('not.be.disabled');
  });

  it('Shows inline error for invalid email format', () => {
    cy.get('input[name="email"]').type('invalid-email');
    cy.get('input[name="name"]').click(); // trigger blur
    cy.contains('请输入有效的邮箱地址').should('be.visible');
  });

  it('Shows inline error for invalid phone format', () => {
    cy.get('input[name="phone"]').type('123');
    cy.get('input[name="name"]').click(); // trigger blur
    cy.contains('请输入11位手机号码').should('be.visible');
  });
});
```

### 2.4 性能阈值测试

```javascript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P1-5 - Page load exceeds 3s on 3G
// Product: TAL Supplier Dashboard

describe('[P1-5] Performance - Page Load Time', () => {
  it('LCP should be under 2.5s on fast connection', () => {
    const lcpThreshold = 2500;
    cy.visit('/dashboard', {
      onBeforeLoad: (win) => {
        const observer = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
          const entries = list.getEntries();
          const lcp = entries[entries.length - 1];
          cy.wrap(lcp.startTime).as('lcpValue');
        });
        observer.observe({ type: 'largest-contentful-paint', buffered: true });
      },
    });
    cy.get('@lcpValue').should('be.lessThan', lcpThreshold);
  });

  it('No images larger than 500KB', () => {
    cy.visit('/dashboard');
    cy.get('img').each(($img) => {
      cy.request($img.attr('src')).then((resp) => {
        expect(resp.headers['content-length'] || 0).to.be.lessThan(500 * 1024);
      });
    });
  });

  it('JS bundle should not exceed 500KB', () => {
    cy.visit('/dashboard');
    cy.window().then((win) => {
      const scripts = Array.from(win.document.querySelectorAll('script[src]'));
      scripts.forEach(($script) => {
        cy.request($script.src).then((resp) => {
          expect(resp.headers['content-length'] || 0).to.be.lessThan(500 * 1024);
        });
      });
    });
  });
});
```

### 2.5 控制台错误检测

```javascript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P0-3 - Console JS Errors on page load
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal

describe('[P0-3] Console Error Detection', () => {
  it('No console errors during page load', () => {
    cy.visit('/', {
      onBeforeLoad(win) {
        cy.spy(win.console, 'error').as('consoleError');
        cy.spy(win.console, 'warn').as('consoleWarn');
      },
    });
    cy.get('@consoleError').should('not.be.called');
  });

  it('No console errors after user interaction', () => {
    cy.visit('/');
    cy.spy(cy.window().console, 'error').as('consoleError');
    cy.get('button').first().click();
    cy.get('@consoleError').should('not.be.called');
  });

  it('No 404 resources loaded', () => {
    cy.visit('/', {
      onBeforeLoad(win) {
        cy.spy(win, 'fetch').as('fetchSpy');
      },
    });
    cy.get('@fetchSpy').then((fetchSpy) => {
      // Check that no fetch resulted in 404 - requires intercept
    });
  });
});
```

---

## 3. Playwright 测试脚本

### 3.1 通用 Playwright 模板

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Source: ACC-2026-0722-001
// Issue: P1-4 - Navigation dropdown not keyboard accessible
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal
// Date: 2026-07-22
// Instructions: npx playwright test --grep "P1-4"

import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';

test.describe('[P1-4] Keyboard Navigation - Dropdown Menu', () => {
  test.beforeEach(async ({ page }) => {
    await page.goto('/supplier/list');
  });

  test('Dropdown opens on Enter key', async ({ page }) => {
    const dropdownTrigger = page.locator('button[aria-haspopup="menu"]').first();
    await dropdownTrigger.focus();
    await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
    const menu = page.locator('[role="menu"]');
    await expect(menu).toBeVisible();
  });

  test('Dropdown items navigable via arrow keys', async ({ page }) => {
    const dropdownTrigger = page.locator('button[aria-haspopup="menu"]').first();
    await dropdownTrigger.focus();
    await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
    await page.keyboard.press('ArrowDown');
    const firstItem = page.locator('[role="menuitem"]').first();
    await expect(firstItem).toBeFocused();
  });

  test('Dropdown closes on Escape key', async ({ page }) => {
    const dropdownTrigger = page.locator('button[aria-haspopup="menu"]').first();
    await dropdownTrigger.focus();
    await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
    await page.keyboard.press('Escape');
    const menu = page.locator('[role="menu"]');
    await expect(menu).not.toBeVisible();
  });

  test('All focusable elements are reachable via Tab', async ({ page }) => {
    const focusableElements = page.locator(
      'button, [href], input, select, textarea, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])'
    );
    const count = await focusableElements.count();
    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
      await page.keyboard.press('Tab');
      const focused = page.locator(':focus');
      await expect(focused).toBeVisible();
    }
  });
});
```

### 3.2 视觉回归检测

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P1-6 - UI regression: button color changed
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal

import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
import pixelmatch from 'pixelmatch';
import { PNG } from 'pngjs';
import fs from 'fs';

test.describe('[P1-6] Visual Regression - Supplier List', () => {
  const baselineDir = './visual-baselines';
  const screenshotDir = './visual-results';

  test('Supplier list matches baseline', async ({ page }) => {
    await page.goto('/supplier/list');
    await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle');

    const screenshot = await page.screenshot({ fullPage: true });
    const currentPath = `${screenshotDir}/supplier-list-current.png`;
    const baselinePath = `${baselineDir}/supplier-list-baseline.png`;
    const diffPath = `${screenshotDir}/supplier-list-diff.png`;

    fs.writeFileSync(currentPath, screenshot);

    // If baseline exists, compare
    if (fs.existsSync(baselinePath)) {
      const baseline = PNG.sync.read(fs.readFileSync(baselinePath));
      const current = PNG.sync.read(screenshot);
      const { width, height } = baseline;
      const diff = new PNG({ width, height });
      const mismatched = pixelmatch(baseline.data, current.data, diff.data, width, height, {
        threshold: 0.1,
      });
      fs.writeFileSync(diffPath, PNG.sync.write(diff));
      const totalPixels = width * height;
      const diffRatio = mismatched / totalPixels;
      expect(diffRatio).toBeLessThan(0.005); // < 0.5% difference
    } else {
      // First run - create baseline
      fs.mkdirSync(baselineDir, { recursive: true });
      fs.writeFileSync(baselinePath, screenshot);
    }
  });
});
```

### 3.3 API 响应验证

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P1-7 - API returns 500 for empty supplier list
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal

import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';

test.describe('[P1-7] API Reliability - Supplier List', () => {
  test('GET /api/suppliers returns 200', async ({ request }) => {
    const response = await request.get('/api/suppliers');
    expect(response.status()).toBe(200);
  });

  test('GET /api/suppliers returns valid JSON', async ({ request }) => {
    const response = await request.get('/api/suppliers');
    const body = await response.json();
    expect(Array.isArray(body.data)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  test('Response time under 500ms', async ({ request }) => {
    const start = Date.now();
    await request.get('/api/suppliers');
    const duration = Date.now() - start;
    expect(duration).toBeLessThan(500);
  });

  test('Pagination works correctly', async ({ request }) => {
    const res1 = await request.get('/api/suppliers?page=1&pageSize=10');
    const data1 = await res1.json();
    expect(data1.data.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(10);

    if (data1.total > 10) {
      const res2 = await request.get('/api/suppliers?page=2&pageSize=10');
      const data2 = await res2.json();
      expect(data2.data.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    }
  });

  test('Error handling: invalid page number', async ({ request }) => {
    const response = await request.get('/api/suppliers?page=-1');
    expect(response.status()).toBe(400);
    const body = await response.json();
    expect(body).toHaveProperty('error');
    expect(body).toHaveProperty('message');
  });
});
```

## 4. Jest/Vitest 单元测试桩

### 4.1 通用 Jest 模板

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P2-1 - Utility function returns NaN for edge cases
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal
// File: src/utils/__tests__/format-currency.test.ts

import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { formatCurrency, parseCurrency } from '../format-currency';

describe('[P2-1] formatCurrency', () => {
  it('formats integer correctly', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(100)).toBe('¥100.00');
  });

  it('formats decimal correctly', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(99.99)).toBe('¥99.99');
  });

  it('handles zero', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(0)).toBe('¥0.00');
  });

  it('handles negative values', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(-50)).toBe('-¥50.00');
  });

  it('handles large numbers', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(1234567.89)).toBe('¥1,234,567.89');
  });

  it('handles null/undefined gracefully', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(null as any)).toBe('¥0.00');
    expect(formatCurrency(undefined as any)).toBe('¥0.00');
  });

  it('handles NaN gracefully', () => {
    expect(formatCurrency(NaN)).toBe('¥0.00');
  });
});

describe('[P2-1] parseCurrency', () => {
  it('parses standard format', () => {
    expect(parseCurrency('¥100.00')).toBe(100);
  });

  it('parses without symbol', () => {
    expect(parseCurrency('99.99')).toBe(99.99);
  });

  it('parses with commas', () => {
    expect(parseCurrency('¥1,234.56')).toBe(1234.56);
  });

  it('returns NaN for invalid input', () => {
    expect(parseCurrency('abc')).toBeNaN();
    expect(parseCurrency('')).toBeNaN();
  });
});
```

### 4.2 React 组件测试

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P2-2 - Empty state not shown when supplier list is empty
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal
// File: src/components/__tests__/SupplierList.test.tsx

import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';
import { render, screen } from '@testing-library/react';
import { SupplierList } from '../SupplierList';

describe('[P2-2] SupplierList - Empty State', () => {
  it('shows empty state when no suppliers exist', () => {
    render(<SupplierList suppliers={[]} />);
    expect(screen.getByText(/暂无供应商/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByAltText('empty-state-illustration')).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('shows "add supplier" CTA in empty state', () => {
    render(<SupplierList suppliers={[]} />);
    const addButton = screen.getByRole('button', { name: /添加供应商/i });
    expect(addButton).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(addButton).not.toBeDisabled();
  });

  it('renders supplier cards when data exists', () => {
    const suppliers = [
      { id: '1', name: 'Supplier A', status: 'active' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Supplier B', status: 'pending' },
    ];
    render(<SupplierList suppliers={suppliers} />);
    expect(screen.getByText('Supplier A')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.getByText('Supplier B')).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.queryByText(/暂无供应商/i)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});
```

### 4.3 状态管理测试

```typescript
// Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
// Issue: P2-3 - Zustand store race condition on rapid updates
// Product: TAL Supplier Portal
// File: src/store/__tests__/supplierStore.test.ts

import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import { useSupplierStore } from '../supplierStore';

describe('[P2-3] Supplier Store - Race Condition', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    useSupplierStore.setState({ suppliers: [], loading: false, error: null });
  });

  it('handles rapid successive updates correctly', async () => {
    const store = useSupplierStore.getState();

    // Simulate rapid dispatches
    await Promise.all([
      store.fetchSuppliers({ page: 1 }),
      store.fetchSuppliers({ page: 2 }),
      store.fetchSuppliers({ page: 3 }),
    ]);

    const finalState = useSupplierStore.getState();
    // The last started request should have resolved last
    expect(finalState.currentPage).toBe(3);
    expect(finalState.loading).toBe(false);
    expect(finalState.error).toBeNull();
  });

  it('does not overwrite data with stale response', async () => {
    // Simulate request that finishes out of order
    const store = useSupplierStore.getState();

    // Fast request
    store.fetchSuppliers({ page: 1 });
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 10));

    // Slow request that started later
    store.fetchSuppliers({ page: 2 });
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100));

    const finalState = useSupplierStore.getState();
    // Should not be on page 1 (stale data shouldn't overwrite)
    expect(finalState.currentPage).toBe(2);
  });
});
```

---

## 5. CI Pipeline 片段

### 5.1 GitHub Actions

```yaml
# Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
# Issue: P1-8 - No automated visual regression in CI
# Product: TAL Supplier Portal

name: Quality Guardian - Visual Regression
on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

jobs:
  visual-regression:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Start server
        run: npm run start &
        env:
          PORT: 3000

      - name: Wait for server
        run: npx wait-on http://localhost:3000

      - name: Run Visual Regression Tests
        run: npx playwright test --grep "visual-regression"

      - name: Upload diff images
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: visual-diffs
          path: ./visual-results/*.png
```

### 5.2 GitLab CI

```yaml
# Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
# Issue: P1-9 - Missing accessibility checks in CI
# Product: TAL Supplier Portal

quality-guardian-accessibility:
  stage: test
  image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.50.0
  script:
    - npm ci
    - npx playwright install --with-deps
    - npm run build
    - npm run start &
    - npx wait-on http://localhost:3000
    - npx playwright test --grep "a11y|accessibility|keyboard"
  artifacts:
    when: always
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - playwright-report/
    reports:
      junit: test-results/junit.xml
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main
```

### 5.3 Lighthouse CI Action

```yaml
# Auto-generated by Quality Guardian
# Issue: P1-10 - Performance score dropped below 80
# Product: TAL Supplier Portal

name: Lighthouse Performance Gate
on:
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - 'src/**/*.js'
      - 'src/**/*.tsx'
      - 'src/**/*.css'

jobs:
  lighthouse-check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build & Start
        run: |
          npm ci
          npm run build
          npm run start &
          npx wait-on http://localhost:3000

      - name: Run Lighthouse
        run: |
          npx lighthouse http://localhost:3000 \
            --output=json \
            --output-path=./lighthouse-report.json \
            --chrome-flags="--no-sandbox --headless" \
            --quiet

      - name: Check Performance Budget
        run: |
          SCORE=$(node -e "const r=require('./lighthouse-report.json'); console.log(r.categories.performance.score * 100)")
          if [ $SCORE -lt 80 ]; then
            echo "Performance score $SCORE is below threshold of 80"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Performance score $SCORE ✓"
```

---

## 6. 脚本生成规则 (Script Generation Rules)

当 Quality Guardian 的 Guardian 或 Simulator 发现问题时，按以下规则生成对应的测试脚本：

### 6.1 触发条件

| 发现类型 | 自动生成脚本 | 示例 |
|---------|------------|------|
| P0 阻断性问题 | 总是生成 | 按钮不可点击、API 500、页面白屏 |
| P1 重要问题 | 总是生成 | 布局错乱、键盘不可操作、性能问题 |
| P2 体验问题 | 按需生成（>3 个同类问题） | 间距不一致、动效缺失 |
| 视觉回归 | 总是生成 screenshot diff | 颜色变化、元素位移、样式变更 |
| 控制台错误 | 总是生成 | JS Error, 404, Warning |
| 安全 Headers 缺失 | 总是生成 | CSP 缺失、X-Frame-Options 缺失 |

### 6.2 脚本优先级

1. 生成 Cypress 脚本（Web 应用首选，社区最广）
2. 生成 Playwright 脚本（跨浏览器测试需要）
3. 生成 Jest/Vitest 桩（纯逻辑问题）
4. 生成 CI 片段（基础设施缺失时）

### 6.3 命名约定

```
问题类型/产品-页面-问题编号.扩展名

示例:
cypress/e2e/accessibility/tal-supplier-list-touch-targets.cy.js
playwright/tests/tal-dashboard-keyboard-nav.spec.ts
src/utils/__tests__/tal-format-currency.test.ts
ci/lighthouse-performance.yml
```

### 6.4 验证指令

每个生成的脚本必须包含：
1. 可直接运行的命令（注释中的 `Instructions:`）
2. 清晰的 describe/it 结构
3. 有意义的断言消息（当断言失败时，看到消息就知道哪里不对）
4. 必要的 beforeEach/beforeAll 设置
